phrases.intent_en: Is the spicy piyaz available today?
phrases.cultural_note: Availability of specific variants is unverified; confirm with staff.

likely_response.local: Evet, usta piyazı yeni yaptı, var.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the master chef just made the piyaz, it is available.

responses.english: Yes, the master chef just made the piyaz, it is available.
